info.name: SC Statehouse REST API
info.description:
South Carolina Statehouse REST API - Legislative data including bills, members, committees, votes, meetings, and more.

Base URL: https://rest.scstatehouse.gov

item.name: General
item.description: Top-level application data, sessions, and homepage content.

request.description: Homepage data including Senate & House session status, video feeds, and overlay messages
Search stop words list used for filtering

item.name: Bills
item.description: Legislative bills, actions, fiscal impact statements, and sponsor data. Bills are organized by session number.

item.name: Get Bill by Session and ID

request.description: Get a specific bill by session and bill ID. Path params: session (100-126), billId (bill number).
Get all bills for a sponsor in a session
Alternate bill data format by session (123-126)

item.name: House
item.description: South Carolina House of Representatives data including members, committees, meetings, rules, and legislative documents.

request.description: Individual House member biography by sponsor code
House members indexed by district number
House committees for a specific session (101-126)
All House committees across all sessions
House calendar for a specific year (2003-2026)
House introductions for a specific year (2001-2026)
House journals for a specific year (1986-2026)
House data for a specific session (101-126)

item.name: Senate
item.description: South Carolina Senate data including members, committees, meetings, rules, and legislative documents.

request.description: Individual Senate member biography by sponsor code
Senate members indexed by district number
Senate committees for a specific session (101-126)
All Senate committees across all sessions
Senate calendar for a specific year
Senate introductions for a specific year
Senate journals for a specific year
Senate data for a specific session (101-126)

item.name: Senate (top-level)
item.description: Additional Senate-related endpoints at the top level.

item.name: Members
item.description: Individual member data accessible by permanent sponsor code.

request.description: Member detail by sponsor code (both chambers). Example: 1002272607
Meeting details by meeting ID (replace '1' with actual meeting key ID)

item.name: Votes
item.description: Roll call vote data by session and chamber.

request.description: All votes (both chambers) for a session
Vote data organized by bill for a session

item.name: Video
item.description: Video streaming data for legislative proceedings.

request.description: Video archive for a specific year (2011+)
Live video data for website display

item.name: Code of Laws
item.description: South Carolina Code of Laws organized by title and chapter.

request.description: Full Code of Laws table of contents (all titles and chapters)
Specific title from the Code of Laws (1-63). Change 'title1' to desired title number.
Code of Regulations table of contents

item.name: Constitution
item.description: South Carolina State Constitution articles and amendments.

item.name: Subjects
item.description: Bill subject/topic classification data by session.

item.name: Dashboard
item.description: Legislative dashboard data for current bills and amendments.

request.description: House amendments for a specific session
Senate amendments for a specific session
Common amendments for a specific session

item.name: Website
item.description: Data consumed by the scstatehouse.gov website.

item.name: Journals
item.description: House and Senate journal search data.
